data.title: 国际服特别补给「Get Set, GO! Special On-Time Gift」

data.body:
[Get Set, GO! Special On-Time Gift]

You look thirsty, Sensei!
Why not partake of these Special Supplies we've prepared for you?

Log in during the event to claim them right away!

🗓️Period: 3/21 (Thu) 3:00 AM – 4/2 (Tue) 0:59 AM (UTC)
